name: Pancit (Philippine Noodles)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a pan and stir fry the garlic until golden brown.
2. Add the diced chicken to the pan and stir well.
3. Add all the sliced vegetables (cabbage, celery, carrots) and mix them with the chicken.
4. Stir in 1 tablespoon of soy sauce until everything is cooked through.
5. Bring a pot of water to boil. Cook the Ramen noodles for 3 minutes or until they are fully cooked.
6. Drain the noodles well using a strainer.
7. In another pan, heat the remaining oil and add the drained noodles.
8. Stir in the soy sauce and cook for a few more minutes.
9. Add the vegetables to the pan and stir until everything is heated through.
10. Serve the Pancit (long life).
